source: Phase 4 expansion analysis on 218-trade BTC-real + alt-synthetic dataset
sigma_for_bb_fair_bps_per_min: computed from vol_30m at evaluation time
notes: bps_thresholds ported verbatim (proposed_threshold_bps) from kalshi_btc_gradient_engine/scripts/monitors/per_crypto_thresholds.json. ETH and SOL showed near-zero discrimination in the Phase 4 analysis - flagged for Phase 6 walk-forward recalibration; current values used as-is.
